New Book Edited by Aslı Togan: Current Topics in Finance: Insights on Evolving Markets and Practices

The book titled

Current Topics in Finance: Insights on Evolving Markets and Practices,

edited by Dr. Aslı Togan, was published by Scala Publishing. The book brings together the work of research-oriented academics from reputable universities in Turkey and presents a compilation of empirical studies in the field of finance using data from different economies of the world. By focusing on a wide range of financial topics from market microstructure, linkages of macroeconomic effects and corporate finance, capital structure choices of firms, banking, supply chain disruptions, environmental, social and governance (ESG) effects, as well as econometric methods used in financial studies, the book intends to provide the reader answers to a vast array of novel financial questions.
